title: psilotum complanatum
intro: Psilotum complanatum, also known as the whisk fern, is a unique, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Psilotaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Psilotum complanatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is primarily limited to traditional and folk medicine.
